lines.lyric: Hey, I want you to see me
lines.lyric_jp: Hey, I want you to see me

lines.lyric: Feel the heartbeat… Yeah
lines.lyric_jp: Feel the heartbeat…Yeah

lines.lyric: One million lights kono sekai de
lines.lyric_jp: One million lights この世界で

lines.lyric: Oshiete kureta no wa That's you
lines.lyric_jp: 教えてくれたのは That’s you

lines.lyric: Tanoshii kimochi tanoshii keshiki
lines.lyric_jp: 楽しいキモチ　楽しい景色

lines.lyric: Sonna kao shinai de Look at me now
lines.lyric_jp: そんな顔しないで Look at me now

lines.lyric: Kara ni tojikomoru kimi o tsuredashite ageru yo
lines.lyric_jp: 殻に閉じこもる君を　連れ出してあげるよ

lines.lyric: Let it go We go, sono egao
lines.lyric_jp: Let it go We go その笑顔

lines.lyric: Nandaka machikirenai mitai!
lines.lyric_jp: なんだか待ちきれないみたい！

lines.lyric: Rikaishi aitai tagai no omoi
lines.lyric_jp: 理解し合いたい　互いのオモイ

lines.lyric: Dakedo round and round nayande
lines.lyric_jp: だけど round and round 悩んで

lines.lyric: (Cause I can't stop) kokoro no koe mitsuketan da
lines.lyric_jp: (Cause I can’t stop) 心の声 見つけたんだ

parts.lyric_jp: 心の声 見つけたんだ

lines.lyric: (You'll find a way) nozomu ga mama de ii janai?
lines.lyric_jp: (You’ll find a way) 望むがままでいいじゃない？

lines.lyric: Tte sou janai? so ii janai?!
lines.lyric_jp: ってそうじゃない？ so いいじゃない？！

lines.lyric: "Ready?"
lines.lyric_jp: “Ready?”

lines.lyric: Let's go! Step into the new world
lines.lyric_jp: Let’s go! Step into the new world

lines.lyric: Itsuwari no nai sugata misete
lines.lyric_jp: 偽りのない姿見せて

lines.lyric: Te o nobashite mite yo hora
lines.lyric_jp: 手を伸ばしてみてよ　ほら

lines.lyric: You're the only one suteki da yo
lines.lyric_jp: You’re the only one 素敵だよ

lines.lyric: Let's go! Step into the new world
lines.lyric_jp: Let’s go! Step into the new world

lines.lyric: Nee, kizuite hoshii
lines.lyric_jp: ねえ、気づいて欲しい

lines.lyric: (Karadajuu de kanjite utau yo zenryoku de)
lines.lyric_jp: (身体中で感じて　歌うよ全力で)

lines.lyric: Tsutawaru made!
lines.lyric_jp: 伝わるまで！

lines.lyric: Tashikana kizuna kanjiteru
lines.lyric_jp: 確かなキズナ　感じてる

lines.lyric: Dokomademo toki o koete.. Eternal Light
lines.lyric_jp: どこまでも時をこえて.. Eternal Light

lines.lyric: Kakureteru Always fuan to kattou shite
lines.lyric_jp: 隠れてる Always 不安と葛藤して

lines.lyric: Kashita kono way like a meiro
lines.lyric_jp: 課したこの way like a 迷路

lines.lyric: Umareta yume e no dauto
lines.lyric_jp: 生まれた　夢へのダウト

lines.lyric: (Bu - But!) Gave me a kindness
lines.lyric_jp: (Bu-But!) Gave me a kindness

lines.lyric: Gave me, gave me a smile
lines.lyric_jp: Gave me, gave me a smile

lines.lyric: This time now tsugi wa kimi o tanoshimaseru ban!
lines.lyric_jp: This time now 次は君を楽しませる番！

lines.lyric: You rescued me
lines.lyric_jp: You rescued me

lines.lyric: Nando datte tasukete kureta ne
lines.lyric_jp: 何度だって助けてくれたね

lines.lyric: Mirai demo sasaetai
lines.lyric_jp: 未来でも支えたい

lines.lyric: Dakedo round and round kuyande
lines.lyric_jp: だけど round and round 悔やんで

lines.lyric: (Just let me know) kokoro no koe kakaeta nayami
lines.lyric_jp: (Just let me know) 心の声　抱えた悩み

parts.lyric_jp: 心の声　抱えた悩み

lines.lyric: (So U&I) ari no mama mukiacchatte
lines.lyric_jp: (So U&I) ありのまま向き合っちゃって

lines.lyric: Ii janai? Tte sou janai?!
lines.lyric_jp: いいじゃない？ってそうじゃない？！

lines.lyric_jp: “Come on!”

lines.lyric: Let's go! Step into the new world
lines.lyric_jp: Let’s go! Step into the new world

lines.lyric_jp: 自由な自分迎えにゆこう

lines.lyric: Kakedaseba tomaranai hora
lines.lyric_jp: 駆け出せば止まらない　ほら
